en: Now a certain man was ill, Lazarus of Bethany, the village of Mary and her sister Martha.
zh: 有一個患病的人，名叫拉撒路，住在伯大尼，就是馬利亞和她姊姊馬大的村莊。

en: It was Mary who anointed the Lord with ointment and wiped his feet with her hair, whose brother Lazarus was ill.
zh: 這馬利亞就是後來用香膏抹主，並且用頭髮把主的腳擦乾的那人；患病的拉撒路是她的兄弟。

en: So the sisters sent to him, saying, "Lord, he whom you love is ill."
zh: 姊妹二人派人到耶穌那裡去，說：“主啊，你所愛的人病了。”

en: But when Jesus heard it he said, "This illness does not lead to death. It is for the glory of God, so that the Son of God may be glorified through it."
zh: 耶穌聽見，就說：“這病不至於死，而是為了 神的榮耀，使 神的兒子因此得到榮耀。”

en: Now Jesus loved Martha and her sister and Lazarus.
zh: 耶穌向來愛馬大和她的妹妹馬利亞，以及拉撒路。

en: So, when he heard that Lazarus was ill, he stayed two days longer in the place where he was.
zh: 他聽說拉撒路病了，仍然在原來的地方住了兩天，

en: Then after this he said to the disciples, "Let us go to Judea again."
zh: 然後對門徒說：“我們再到猶太去吧。”

en: The disciples said to him, "Rabbi, the Jews were just now seeking to stone you, and are you going there again?"
zh: 門徒對他說：“拉比，近來猶太人要拿石頭打你，你還到那裡去嗎？”

en: Jesus answered, "Are there not twelve hours in the day? If anyone walks in the day, he does not stumble, because he sees the light of this world.
zh: 耶穌說：“白晝不是有十二小時嗎？人若在白晝行走，就不會跌倒，因為他看見這世上的光；

en: But if anyone walks in the night, he stumbles, because the light is not in him."
zh: 人若在夜間行走，就會跌倒，因為他沒有光。”

en: After saying these things, he said to them, "Our friend Lazarus has fallen asleep, but I go to awaken him."
zh: 耶穌說完了這些話，跟著又對他們說：“我們的朋友拉撒路睡了，我要去喚醒他。”

en: The disciples said to him, "Lord, if he has fallen asleep, he will recover."
zh: 門徒說：“主啊，如果他睡了，就會好過來的。”

en: Now Jesus had spoken of his death, but they thought that he meant taking rest in sleep.
zh: 其實耶穌是指著拉撒路的死說的，門徒卻以為他是指正常的睡眠說的。

en: Then Jesus told them plainly, "Lazarus has died,
zh: 於是，耶穌公開地告訴他們：“拉撒路死了。

en: and for your sake I am glad that I was not there, so that you may believe. But let us go to him."
zh: 我為你們歡喜，因為我不在那裡，是要使你們相信。現在我們到他那裡去吧。”

en: So Thomas, called the Twin, said to his fellow disciples, "Let us also go, that we may die with him."
zh: 那稱為“雙生子” 的多馬，對其他的門徒說：“我們也去跟他一同死吧！”

en: Now when Jesus came, he found that Lazarus had already been in the tomb four days.
zh: 耶穌到了，知道拉撒路在墳墓裡已經四天了。

en: Bethany was near Jerusalem, about two miles off,
zh: 伯大尼靠近耶路撒冷，相距約有三公里。

en: and many of the Jews had come to Martha and Mary to console them concerning their brother.
zh: 有許多猶太人來到馬大和馬利亞那裡，為了拉撒路的死來安慰她們。

en: So when Martha heard that Jesus was coming, she went and met him, but Mary remained seated in the house.
zh: 馬大聽見耶穌來了，就去迎接他，馬利亞卻仍然坐在家裡。

en: Martha said to Jesus, "Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.
zh: 馬大對耶穌說：“主啊，如果你早在這裡，我的兄弟就不會死了！

en: But even now I know that whatever you ask from God, God will give you."
zh: 就是現在，我也知道無論你向 神求甚麼， 神必賜給你。”

en: Jesus said to her, "Your brother will rise again."
zh: 耶穌對她說：“你的兄弟必會復活。”

en: Martha said to him, "I know that he will rise again in the resurrection on the last day."
zh: 馬大說：“我知道在末日復活的時候，他必會復活。”

en: Jesus said to her, "I am the resurrection and the life. Whoever believes in me, though he die, yet shall he live,
zh: 耶穌說：“我就是復活和生命；信我的人，雖然死了，也要活著。

en: and everyone who lives and believes in me shall never die. Do you believe this?"
zh: 所有活著又信我的人，必定永遠不死，你信這話嗎？”

en: She said to him, "Yes, Lord; I believe that you are the Christ, the Son of God, who is coming into the world."
zh: 她說：“主啊，我信；我已經信了，你是基督，是 神的兒子，是那要到世上來的。”

en: When she had said this, she went and called her sister Mary, saying in private, "The Teacher is here and is calling for you."
zh: 馬大說了這些話，就回去叫她妹妹馬利亞，暗暗地說：“老師來了，他叫你。”

en: And when she heard it, she rose quickly and went to him.
zh: 馬利亞一聽見，就急忙起來，到耶穌那裡去。

en: Now Jesus had not yet come into the village, but was still in the place where Martha had met him.
zh: 那時，耶穌還沒有進入村子，仍然在馬大迎接他的地方。

en: When the Jews who were with her in the house, consoling her, saw Mary rise quickly and go out, they followed her, supposing that she was going to the tomb to weep there.
zh: 那些在房子裡和馬利亞在一起安慰她的猶太人，見她匆忙地起來出去，就跟著她，以為她要到墳墓那裡去哭。

en: Now when Mary came to where Jesus was and saw him, she fell at his feet, saying to him, "Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died."
zh: 馬利亞來到耶穌那裡，一看見他，就俯伏在他腳前，說：“主啊，如果你早在這裡，我的兄弟就不會死了！”

en: When Jesus saw her weeping, and the Jews who had come with her also weeping, he was deeply moved in his spirit and greatly troubled.
zh: 耶穌看見她在哭，和她一同來的猶太人也在哭，就心裡激動，難過起來，

en: And he said, "Where have you laid him?" They said to him, "Lord, come and see."
zh: 說：“你們把他安放在哪裡？”他們說：“主啊，請來看。”

en: Jesus wept.
zh: 耶穌哭了。

en: So the Jews said, "See how he loved him!"
zh: 於是猶太人說：“你看，他多麼愛這個人！”

en: But some of them said, "Could not he who opened the eyes of the blind man also have kept this man from dying?"
zh: 他們中間有人說：“他既然開了瞎子的眼睛，難道不能使這個人不死嗎？”

en: Then Jesus, deeply moved again, came to the tomb. It was a cave, and a stone lay against it.
zh: 耶穌又再心裡激動，來到墳墓前面。那墳墓是一個洞穴，洞口有塊石頭堵住。

en: Jesus said, "Take away the stone." Martha, the sister of the dead man, said to him, "Lord, by this time there will be an odor, for he has been dead four days."
zh: 耶穌說：“把這塊石頭挪開！”死者的姊姊馬大對他說：“主啊，已經四天了，他必定臭了。”

en: Jesus said to her, "Did I not tell you that if you believed you would see the glory of God?"
zh: 耶穌說：“我不是對你說過‘如果你信，就必定看見 神的榮耀’嗎？”

en: So they took away the stone. And Jesus lifted up his eyes and said, "Father, I thank you that you have heard me.
zh: 於是他們把石頭挪開。耶穌舉目向天，說：“父啊，我感謝你，因為你垂聽了我，

en: I knew that you always hear me, but I said this on account of the people standing around, that they may believe that you sent me."
zh: 我知道你常常聽我，但我說這話，是為了周圍站著的群眾，叫他們信是你差了我來。”

en: When he had said these things, he cried out with a loud voice, "Lazarus, come out."
zh: 說了這話，就大聲呼喊：“拉撒路，出來！”

en: The man who had died came out, his hands and feet bound with linen strips, and his face wrapped with a cloth. Jesus said to them, "Unbind him, and let him go."
zh: 那死了的人就出來，他的手腳都纏著布，臉上裹著巾。耶穌說：“解開他，讓他走！”

en: Many of the Jews therefore, who had come with Mary and had seen what he did, believed in him,
zh: 有許多到馬利亞那裡去的猶太人，看見了耶穌所作的事，就信了他。

en: but some of them went to the Pharisees and told them what Jesus had done.
zh: 但他們中間有些人到法利賽人那裡去，把耶穌所作的事都告訴他們。

en: So the chief priests and the Pharisees gathered the Council and said, "What are we to do? For this man performs many signs.
zh: 於是祭司長和法利賽人召開公議會，說：“這個人行了許多神蹟，我們怎麼辦呢？

en: If we let him go on like this, everyone will believe in him, and the Romans will come and take away both our place and our nation."
zh: 我們若讓他這樣，所有的人都會信他，羅馬人就會來，奪取我們的聖地，除滅我們的民族。”

en: But one of them, Caiaphas, who was high priest that year, said to them, "You know nothing at all.
zh: 他們當中有一位該亞法，是那年作大祭司的，對他們說：“你們甚麼都不知道，

en: Nor do you understand that it is better for you that one man should die for the people, not that the whole nation should perish."
zh: 也不去想想，一個人代替人民死，免得整個民族滅亡，這對你們是有益的。”

en: He did not say this of his own accord, but being high priest that year he prophesied that Jesus would die for the nation,
zh: 他說這話不是由於自己，而是因為他是那年的大祭司，所以預言耶穌要替猶太民族死；

en: and not for the nation only, but also to gather into one the children of God who are scattered abroad.
zh: 不但替猶太民族死，也要把散居各地的 神的兒女招聚成為一體。

en: So from that day on they made plans to put him to death.
zh: 從那天起，他們就想殺害耶穌。

en: Jesus therefore no longer walked openly among the Jews, but went from there to the region near the wilderness, to a town called Ephraim, and there he stayed with the disciples.
zh: 因此，耶穌不再在猶太人中間公開活動，卻離開那裡，到曠野附近的地方去；到了一座名叫以法蓮的城，就和門徒住在那裡。

en: Now the Passover of the Jews was at hand, and many went up from the country to Jerusalem before the Passover to purify themselves.
zh: 猶太人的逾越節快到了，有許多人在過節前從各鄉上耶路撒冷去，要在那裡潔淨自己。

en: They were looking for Jesus and saying to one another as they stood in the temple, "What do you think? That he will not come to the feast at all?"
zh: 他們到處尋找耶穌，站在聖殿裡的時候，彼此說：“你們認為怎樣？他不會來過節吧？”

en: Now the chief priests and the Pharisees had given orders that if anyone knew where he was, he should let them know, so that they might arrest him.
zh: 祭司長和法利賽人早已下了命令：如果有人知道耶穌在哪裡，就要前來報告，好去逮捕他。
